description: Petition or report. In Arabic script. Quite faded. The ends of 5 lines are preserved. Mentions that a certain ʿāmil is more capable than somebody else (aqdar minhu) and then mentions "the lofty order" (al-amr al-ʿālī). Reused for Hebrew literary text on verso.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
